en-US.title: PostureAI Pro — Workforce Health
en-US.subtitle: AI Posture Coach for Teams
en-US.description:
PostureAI Pro uses your camera and AI to analyze your posture in real time, giving you gentle coaching nudges and building healthy habits — for individuals and enterprise teams.

✅ FEATURES:
• Real-time AI posture analysis
• Personalized coaching voice
• Weekly health reports
• Team leaderboard
• HR analytics dashboard (enterprise)
• Arabic + English support
• Works on any Mac, Windows, or Linux

🔒 PRIVACY:
All video is processed on-device. No frames, images, or video are ever stored or transmitted. Only anonymised posture scores are saved.

🏢 ENTERPRISE:
RBAC, SSO/SAML, multi-tenant, white-label, SLA. Contact sales@postureai.com.
en-US.keywords: posture, ergonomics, workplace health, AI, coaching, back pain, neck pain, HR analytics
